name: lemur_task
description: Run a custom LLM task on one or more transcripts using LeMUR.

parameters.name: transcript_ids
parameters.description: Array of transcript IDs to process.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Custom prompt for the LLM task.
parameters.example: Summarize the key action items from this meeting.

parameters.name: final_model
parameters.description: LLM model: default, basic, or a specific model.

body.prompt: Summarize the key action items from this meeting.

body.response: The key action items discussed were: 1. Complete the project proposal by Friday. 2. Schedule a follow-up meeting next week.
